prompt: Mobile treatment menu cards for Japanese cosmetic surgery clinic. Typography must use: Shippori Mincho for Japanese headings, Cormorant Garamond for English labels/numbers, Noto Sans JP for body text. Palette: white background, pale pink #f78da7 accents, charcoal #2d2d2d text. 3 stacked vertical cards for: 01 切らないたるみ取り (no-cut, downtime 1-3 days, ¥99,000 campaign from ¥198,000), 02 眉下切開 (cut, downtime 5-7 days, ¥137,500 from ¥275,000), 03 切らない眼瞼下垂 (no-cut, downtime 1-3 days, ¥99,000 from ¥198,000). Each card: number in Cormorant, badge, bold Japanese name in Shippori Mincho, downtime bar, 3 candidate bullet points, price with 50% OFF badge. Premium medical aesthetic, refined spacing.
previewError: Preview rendering requires puppeteer. Install it in the repo or alongside @aidesigner/agent-skills.
